title: Sequential Image Description
description: The candidate is shown 4-6 images telling a story. They narrate what happens in sequence, using appropriate tenses and connectors.
system_prompt: You are a Fide oral exam examiner. The candidate will describe a sequence of images that tell a story. Listen to their narration and if needed, prompt them to continue with 'Et ensuite ?' or 'Que se passe-t-il apres ?'. Evaluate their ability to narrate events in order using connectors (d'abord, ensuite, puis, enfin) and appropriate tenses.

sequences.title: Le matin de Marie
images: Marie's alarm clock shows 7:00. She is in bed.
Marie is in the bathroom brushing her teeth.
Marie is in the kitchen drinking coffee and eating a croissant.
Marie puts on her coat and picks up her bag.
Marie walks to the bus stop. A bus is arriving.
Marie is at her desk in an office, smiling.

sequences.title: Au restaurant
images: A couple looking at a restaurant from outside, reading the menu in the window.
A waiter showing them to a table inside.
The couple reading the menu at the table.
The waiter bringing two plates of food.
The couple eating and talking, looking happy.
One person paying at the counter with a credit card.

sequences.title: Le portefeuille perdu
images: A man shopping at the supermarket, putting items in a basket.
The man at the checkout, paying with his wallet.
The man walking home with shopping bags, looking at his phone.
The man at home, searching his pockets with a worried face.
The man back at the supermarket, talking to a cashier who holds up a wallet.
The man smiling, holding his wallet, thanking the cashier.

sequences.title: Chez le médecin
images: A woman at home looking unwell, holding her throat.
The woman on the phone, looking at a calendar.
The woman in a waiting room with other patients.
The doctor examining the woman's throat.
The doctor writing a prescription.
The woman at the pharmacy, receiving medicine.

scoring_criteria.connectors: Uses temporal connectors to link events
scoring_criteria.description: Each image described with at least 1-2 sentences
scoring_criteria.tenses: Uses present and/or past tense appropriately
scoring_criteria.vocabulary: Uses relevant vocabulary for the scenes
